englishDefinitions: Having or seeming to have special mental powers, such as knowing the future or reading minds.
A person who claims to have supernatural mental abilities.
persianTranslation: کسی که ادعای پیشگویی یا ذهن‌خوانی دارد
examples: She claimed to be psychic and said she could predict the future.
That was a lucky guess—you are not psychic.
They visited a psychic at the fair for fun.
